case_title: RAYMOND JETER VS. ZHI HUA HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,784.58 FILED BY JETER, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHI HUA FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY C/O DOREN E HOHL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JETER, RAYMOND ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED DEC-07-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHI HUA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY C/O DOREN E HOHL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JETER, AND DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE CO. C/O DOREN E. HOHL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ZHI HUA HUANG. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED AS TO FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY C/O DOREN E HOHL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-17-2012 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JETER, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHI HUA $3,784.58 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,829.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHI HUA
CLAIM AGAINST FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY C/O DOREN E. HOHL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; ORDER DATED JANUARY 17, 2012.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JETER, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHI HUA $3,784.58 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,829.58, **JUDGMENT IS CORRECTED TO SHOW THAT CLAIM AGAINST FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY C/O DOREN E. HOHL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT IS NUNC PRO TUNC AS OF JANUARY 17, 2012.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
